mapper.sql: id, user_id, category_name, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert:
insert into category
id,
user_id,
category_name,
create_time,
update_time,
deleted,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.update:
update category
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
category_name = #{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update category set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, category_name = #{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select from category where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and deleted = 0 order by create_time desc

select from category where deleted = 0 and id in
#{item}
